<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Mount Myōken]][[ja:妙見山]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Mount Myōken]][[ja:妙見山]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Mount Myōken]][[ja:妙見山]]

{{nihongo|'''Mount Myōken'''|妙見山}} is the name of several mountains in Japan:
* [[Myōkenzan (Osaka and Hyōgo)|Mount Myōken (Nose)]] on the borders of Hyōgo and Osaka prefectures - see {{ill|Myoken Cable|en|Myoken Cable|qid=Q6947939|lt=Myoken Cable|1=Myoken Cable}}
* {{ill|Mount Myōken (Tajima)|en|Mount Myōken (Tajima)|qid=Q6922336|lt=Mount Myōken (Tajima)|1=Mount Myōken (Tajima)}} in Hyōgo Prefecture

{{disambig|geo}}
{{translated page|ja|妙見山|version=102409134|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[ja:妙見山]]
[[en:Mount Myōken]]

<!--Mount Myōken--><!--Mount Myōken--><!--Mount Myōken--><!--Mount Myōken--><!--Mount Myōken--><!--Mount Myōken--><!--Mount Myōken--><!--Mount Myōken--><!--Mount Myōken-->
<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
<!--enwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
{{disambiguation}}
{{wikidata link|Q868348}}
[[Category:All disambiguation pages]]
[[Category:Mountains with the same name]]
[[Category:Temple Mountain Names]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
